text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One and I decide she should race in the
autumn Tenno Sho to gain more experience in big
races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The best runners of this generation are going to
be there, including the Beast Oguri Cap, and
White Lightning Tamamo Cross.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Undeterred by the sheer presence those two
have, Inari One readies herself and dives straight
into their party, and the race finally begins!
